top3.sql:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_molecules_with_double_bond,
  SUM(CASE WHEN m.label = 'carcinogenic compound' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS carcinogenic_count
FROM molecule m
INNER JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double';

SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS total_molecules_with_double_bond,
    SUM(CASE WHEN m.label = 'carcinogenic compound' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS carcinogenic_molecules
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double';

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_molecules_with_double_bond,
  SUM(CASE WHEN m.label = 'carcinogenic compound' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS carcinogenic_count
FROM molecule m
INNER JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double';

SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id) AS total_molecules_with_double_bond,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN m.label = 'carcinogenic compound' THEN m.molecule_id END) AS carcinogenic_molecules
FROM molecule m
INNER JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double';

SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id) AS total_molecules_with_double_bond,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN m.label = 'carcinogenic compound' THEN m.molecule_id END) AS carcinogenic_count
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double';

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_molecules_with_double_bond,
  SUM(CASE WHEN m.label = 'carcinogenic compound' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS carcinogenic_count
FROM molecule m
INNER JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double';

SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id) AS total_molecules_with_double_bond,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN m.label = 'carcinogenic compound' THEN m.molecule_id END) AS carcinogenic_molecules
FROM molecule m
INNER JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double';

SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id) AS total_molecules_with_double_bond,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN m.label = 'carcinogenic compound' THEN m.molecule_id END) AS carcinogenic_count
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double';

final.sql:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_molecules_with_double_bond,
  SUM(CASE WHEN m.label = 'carcinogenic compound' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS carcinogenic_count
FROM molecule m
INNER JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'double';
